# Adversa Notes
---
**Adversa** is a [Typst](https://typst.app) template intended for taking course notes, mainly focused on mathematical and computer science subjects. The inspiration comes from other typst templates such as `minimal-notes` and `mousse-notes` tweaked for my own liking.

## Installation
To view a demo template from CLI, run the following command in the desired folder of your choice.

For Windows
```bash
typst init @local/adversa:1.1.0 dir
```
